title: Phase 12C: Reports - service, API, report page, chart components
description: Build reporting system: report service with data aggregation for all 16 report types, report API routes, reports page with selector/filters/export, and chart components for on-time delivery, route profitability, order cycle time, collector performance, vendor fill rate, price change impact, and 10 additional reports.
steps: Create src/lib/services/report.service.ts with data aggregation for all report types
Create src/app/api/reports/[type]/route.ts with parameterized report endpoint
Create src/app/(dashboard)/reports/page.tsx with report selector, date range picker, branch filter, export to CSV/PDF
Create src/components/reports/order-cycle-time.tsx with order cycle time chart
Create src/components/reports/vendor-fill-rate.tsx with vendor fill rate chart
Create src/components/reports/price-change-impact.tsx with price change impact chart
Create 10 additional report components covering remaining report types
